title: GuardConfig
description:
Guard daemon configuration.

Controls thresholds, polling interval, and circuit breaker behavior
for the background context protection daemon.

hard_threshold.description: Hard threshold as percentage of context window (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.8.

hard_threshold_bytes.description: Hard threshold as file size in bytes. Optional, whichever fires first wins.

max_recoveries.description: Maximum recovery attempts before circuit breaker trips. Default: 3.

recovery_window_secs.description: Time window in seconds for counting recoveries. Default: 600 (10 minutes).

soft_threshold.description: Soft threshold as percentage of context window (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.6.

soft_threshold_bytes.description: Soft threshold as file size in bytes. Optional, whichever fires first wins.
